description: Configuration for build tests - defines expected failures and samples to skip

skip.reason: .NET Blazor samples require different build tooling (dotnet SDK)
Nested manifest-configurations are not meant to be built in place - files should be copied to parent directory

notes: expectedFailures: Builds that are known to fail but should still be tested to detect if they get fixed
skip: Samples that should not be tested at all (different tech stack, etc.)
pattern: If specified, matches any path containing this string
